properties.notes: Usually extended story.  Mission-based story-telling scales well over long periods.
Usually full story.  It is hard to maintain ad-hoc traversal indefinitely.  Extended stories need more of a template so the author isn’t continually re-inventing the wheel.

properties.description: When events are regularly spread across multiple days, with pauses in the action each day or night.  Eventful days are mostly consecutive with few breaks.
When it is common to have time lapses that span more than a day.

properties.notes: Usually full story.  A single quest is stretched thin across an extended story.

properties.subtitle: The World of Light and Darkness

properties.description: When each event is immediately followed by the next event.  There can be short time lapses, but they need to feel seamless.
